title: Trimi TikTok Email Hunter — Input
description: Configurable per-run. Defaults are pre-tuned to Trimi's ICP based on historical hit-rate data: partnership-ready mom-creator and wellness-routine influencers in the US, 1.5k–150k followers, with discoverable emails in bio or link-in-bio.

hashtags.title: Hashtags to scan
hashtags.description: TikTok hashtags (without the # prefix). Defaults are the 19 hashtags that have delivered ≥6 emails per run in Trimi's actual Apify production data (683 emails across 8 runs). Hashtags historically strong in the free bot but consistently challenged by TikTok on Apify residential IPs have been removed to maximize $/email — feel free to re-add them via the UI to A/B-test.

minFollowers.title: Min followers
minFollowers.description: Profiles below this follower count are skipped. Trimi's tested floor is 1500 — anything lower tends to be inactive or audience-less.

maxFollowers.title: Max followers
maxFollowers.description: Profiles above this follower count are skipped. 150,000 is the upper bound for Trimi's micro-influencer band — large accounts charge fees Trimi can't match for commission deals.

maxProfilesPerHashtag.title: Max profiles per hashtag
maxProfilesPerHashtag.description: How many candidate profiles to visit from each hashtag page after pre-filtering. Production data shows clear diminishing returns past 50 — top hashtags surface 50-90 candidates but only deliver ~5-25 emails. Raise above 50 only if you're targeting a specific high-yield hashtag.

concurrentProfiles.title: Parallel profile tabs
concurrentProfiles.description: How many TikTok profile pages to load in parallel. 3 is the sweet spot for residential proxies — higher risks bot challenges.

usOnly.title: US-only filter
usOnly.description: Skip profiles whose region field or bio signals non-US. Trimi only ships in the US.

skipGhostAccounts.title: Skip ghost/bot accounts
skipGhostAccounts.description: Skip profiles with ≥5000 followers but 0 cumulative likes — a strong purchased-followers / dead-account signal.

scrapeLinkInBio.title: Scrape link-in-bio pages
scrapeLinkInBio.description: When no email in bio, follow the bio link (linktr.ee, beacons.ai, personal sites) and extract emails from there. ~2x yield boost; ~30% slower per profile.

brandSkiplist.title: Brand / corporate skiplist
brandSkiplist.description: Usernames to skip — covers brand accounts that show up in fashion/plus-size hashtags but are never partnership-ready individuals.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy settings. RESIDENTIAL is strongly recommended — TikTok actively rate-limits datacenter IPs and the SCALE plan includes residential bandwidth.

earlyExitNoEmailThreshold.title: Early-exit threshold
earlyExitNoEmailThreshold.description: If the first N profiles of a hashtag yield zero emails, skip the rest of that hashtag. Saves credit on dead hashtags during scaling runs.
